SaintapediaSortSidebarEnabled.description: Enable the sidebar (flex) layout for Special:Drilldown. Set false to disable entirely and fall back to Cargo defaults.

SaintapediaSortSidebarWidth.description: Width of the filter sidebar in pixels (desktop).

SaintapediaSortShowFilterChips.description: Show active-filter chips above the results area.

SaintapediaSortStickyFilters.description: Make the filter sidebar sticky while the user scrolls results.

SaintapediaSortMobileBreakpoint.description: Viewport width (px) below which the layout switches to stacked / mobile mode.
